        diff.append(i)

    print(f"Row", r, ":", after_lines[r])
</parameter>
</function>

- Row 40 before: `ccccccccggNNggccccccccccccccccccBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB`
 Row 40 after: `ccccccccggggNNccccccccccccccccccBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB`
So the NN (light green) moved from cols 10-11 to cols 12-13. That's a rightward shift by 2 columns.
And row 63 changed from all G to having W pixels - this looks like a progress bar at the bottom.
